name: copywriting-toolkit
description: Pipeline copywriting toolkit — 14 skills from intake to audit, grounded in PASONA/Cialdini/FTC.

interface.shortDescription: Pipeline copywriting from intake to ethics audit, grounded in PASONA / Cialdini / FTC
interface.longDescription: Use copywriting-toolkit to drive copy through a 14-skill pipeline — intake, voice/tone and voice-quadrant calibration, ideation, neta-injection, and short / mid / long-form drafting (PASONA structure) — then through form-check, ethics-check, and final audit gates. Grounded in PASONA, Cialdini's persuasion principles, and FTC disclosure rules so persuasion stays honest.
defaultPrompt: Write landing-page copy for this product.
Draft a PASONA long-form sales page.
Audit this copy for ethics and FTC compliance.
